标题: MM6 Majila embroidered digital letter round neck sweatshirt, unisex. Made of 380g looped fabric, not subjected to high temperature shrinkage twice, with a controlled shrinkage rate within 2% regardless of cost, featuring unique hand-sewn label design language. Consistent design across all labels! Embroidered logo using Tajima machine, with fine embroidery, no fuzzy edges or stray threads, distinct texture, unbeatable feel. Details make all the difference! Sizes: M-3XL.

MM6 Magliera couple short-sleeve T-shirt, a simple yet stylish MM6 short-sleeve that balances comfort and fashion effortlessly. Made of high-quality heavyweight pure cotton knit, it is solid, breathable, and soft against the skin, ensuring maximum comfort. Featuring a classic minimalist style with subtle iconic details on the chest, it is versatile and trendy. The loose OS cut fits all body types. Perfect for couples to wear together, creating a relaxed and stylish look for daily outings or dates. Sizes range from XS to XL.

Maison Margiela MM6 duct tape label short-sleeve T-shirt is made of 200gsm combed cotton, double air-jet combed to remove short fiber impurities, ensuring breathability and structure when worn in summer, avoiding the soft and limp issues of regular cotton. Transparent duct tape element is embedded into the fabric surface using ultrasonic heat pressing technology, with tape thickness precisely at 0.15mm, ensuring visual transparency while maintaining machine washability (below 30°C). The overall stitching is straight and delicate, fabric is comfortable and soft, color consistent without color difference. Can be styled with the same model to create fashionable looks for various occasions, with custom accessories, complete with three labels, unisex! Sizes: XS-XL XS: Shoulder 52.5, Chest 108, Length 72 S: Shoulder 55, Chest 114, Length 74 M: Shoulder 57.5, Chest 120, Length 76 L: Shoulder 60, Chest 126, Length 78 XL: Shoulder 62.5, Chest 132, Length 80.

MM6 fake two-piece V-neck knitted sweater, featuring a color-block design that combines two styles in one piece. Maison Margiela MM6 jacket features a mix of materials: the main body is made of high-density matte nylon fabric with a subtle embossed texture, providing structure and water resistance; the collar is made of corduroy material, seamlessly connected to the body with precise edging for a contrasting texture. The jacket is seamlessly quilted for even insulation, with a relaxed silhouette from the 3D cutting. It has a custom metal zipper at the front, ribbed cuffs and hem, hidden side pockets, and neat stitching with matching high-tensile thread. The design combines vintage aesthetics with modern functionality, offering a loose fit suitable for various styles. The straight and delicate stitching, comfortable fabric, consistent color, and unisex sizing from 44 to XL make it versatile for creating fashionable looks for any occasion.

Maison Margiela MM6 patchwork needle knit cardigan, made of delicate and soft 50-count cotton wool yarn, woven with 14-gauge German imported machine. Lightweight and warm, suitable for layering. Maison Margiela MM6 distressed knit jacquard high-neck sweater, made of delicate and soft 50-count cotton wool yarn, woven with a 14-gauge German imported machine. Maison Margiela MM6 digital hollow knit sweater made of cloud-like cashmere, soft and delicate, comfortable to wear. Featuring a sophisticated black and gray color scheme, exuding inherent luxury. Adorned with the brand's iconic digital logo on the chest, outlining a fashionable silhouette engraved with the passage of time. Introducing a disruptive element with holes on a cream base, creating a sense of high-end sophistication within imperfections. Intricate details showcase a high-end style, embodying luxury beauty. The destructive needle-punching technique creates various-sized holes by selectively removing yarns after the knit fabric is formed, then hand-locking the edges for a unique finish. Made with precision using a German jacquard weave, the fabric showcases Maison Margiela's digital jacquard art pattern, adding depth and dimension. Garment washing and softening techniques remove odors and enhance the fabric's feel and appearance. Sizes available: S-XL.

Color: White

Number: Original version, made of pure cotton fabric, extremely delicate with a comfortable and soft touch. Perfect flawless detail processing. Latest original custom full set of accessories including tags, packaging bag, stickers, washing label, etc.
【MM】In the year, fashion designer Martin Margiela founded the eponymous fashion brand, quickly becoming a pioneer in the avant-garde fashion world of Belgium. The brand is currently led by a design team, continuing the founder's tradition of anonymity throughout his entire career, refusing interviews and public appearances. Sportswear, clever printed patterns, sneakers, and geometric shapes often appear in the brand's essential pieces, offering a unique interpretation of urban style.

Maison Margiela Unfinished Embroidered Print Short Sleeve Custom High-Density Soft Velvet Single-Sided Knit Fabric. Soft, delicate, comfortable and skin-friendly. Soft apricot as the main color, with a mysterious string of numbers as a reference, enhancing the brand's identity. The print and embroidery on the garment dance in harmony, presenting a subtle and intriguing presence, leaving blank spaces for endless imagination. Walking in a unique style on the urban fashion scene. Craftsmanship: Using imported machine embroidery technology with advanced computer control systems and precision mechanical parts. Maison Margiela's unfinished embroidery work is high precision, with smooth and delicate lines. Craftsmanship: Using rubber printing, the front print has undergone three film screen modifications, printing patterns on fabric with rubber liquid paint, then baking the fabric to fix the print. Craftsmanship: Each piece is hand-sewn by master craftsmen to ensure accuracy in position and spacing, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship and attention to detail. Craftsmanship: Fabrics are washed for better texture, ensuring durability, shape retention, and colorfastness. Accessories: Custom MM logo. Style: Loose fit. Sizes: XS, S, M, L. 🔥

Maison Margiela tape number label short sleeve, made of custom cloud-like soft cotton, smooth and delicate, comfortable and skin-friendly. The main color tone is pure white, simple and high-end. Adorned with a striking Maison Margiela tape number label on the chest, the texture of the tape and the arrangement of the numbers are casual yet exquisite, breaking monotony in a concise way. Low-key yet luxurious. Craftsmanship: High-temperature heat press technology using high temperature and pressure to permanently bond the heat transfer material to the fabric surface, melting the glue at a certain temperature and bonding it with the fabric fibers, firm and aesthetically pleasing. Craftsmanship: The fabric has been washed for better hand feel and texture, resistant to deformation, shrinkage, and fading, maintaining long-lasting beauty. Accessories: Custom MM logo. Style: Loose fit. Sizes: S, M, L, XL. 🔥

Adorned with a striking Maison Margiela tape number label on the chest, the texture of the tape and the arrangement of the numbers are casual yet exquisite, breaking monotony in a concise way. Low-key yet luxurious. Craftsmanship: High-temperature heat press technology using high temperature and pressure to permanently bond the heat transfer material to the fabric surface, melting the glue at a certain temperature and bonding it with the fabric fibers, firm and aesthetically pleasing. Craftsmanship: The fabric has been washed for better hand feel and texture, resistant to deformation, shrinkage, and fading, maintaining long-lasting beauty. Accessories: Custom MM logo. Style: Loose fit. Sizes: S, M, L, XL. 🔥

Maison Margiela's digital print color-block shirt is crafted from custom-made fine cotton with delicate satin stripes and a thin, wrinkle-resistant plain weave fabric. The shirt is exquisitely detailed, comfortable, and skin-friendly. The pure white and soft beige colors are cleverly combined, striking a delicate balance between rationality and sensibility, exuding a cozy and lazy vibe. The shirt features digital numbers and symbols arranged in an artistic manner, adding a touch of mystery and modernity to the overall look. It walks in a unique posture on the urban fashion scene. Craftsmanship includes hand-adjusted panel printing, meticulous fringing, hidden seam stitching, and fabric sand washing for a better hand feel, shape retention, and colorfastness. Accessories include custom MM shell buttons and MM logo. The shirt has a loose fit and comes in various sizes.

Maison Margiela unfinished embroidered floral short-sleeve custom high-density soft velvet single-sided knit fabric. Soft, delicate, comfortable, and skin-friendly. Soft apricot as the main color with a mysterious string of numbers as a reference, enhancing the brand's identity. The body features a harmonious dance of prints and embroidery, presenting an elusive stance, leaving blank spaces for endless imagination. Walking in a unique style on the urban fashion map, using imported machine embroidery technology with advanced computer control systems and precision mechanical parts. Maison Margiela's unfinished embroidery work is high precision, with smooth and delicate lines. Using rubber printing, the front print has undergone three film screen modifications, printing patterns on fabric with rubber liquid paint, baking the fabric to fix the print. Each piece is hand-sewn by craftsmen to ensure accuracy in position and spacing. Hand-sewn craftsmanship reflects the exquisite skills of artisans and attention to detail. Fabrics are washed for better texture and feel, resistant to deformation, shrinking, and fading, maintaining long-lasting beauty. Sizes: XS, S, M, L. Size Chart: XS - Chest, Length, Shoulder. S - Chest, Length, Shoulder. M - Chest, Length, Shoulder. L - Chest, Length, Shoulder.
